description: As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

diff: Some Processes require Primitive Inputs that are organized into multiple sequential stages (also called "Input stages"). Each Input stage must be completed before progressing to the next, ensuring that all dependencies and validations are met in order. Once an Input stage is completed, the subsequent Input stage is initiated automatically, continuing in this manner until all stages have been finished.

Upon completing the final Primitive Input stage, the Process Definition transitions to the `Required Outputs` schema component; this component defines the necessary updates to Sky Core Atlas or Agent Artifact Documents.
description:
Extra spaces have been removed.

---

The following have been kept unchanged:

- Code blocks/lines have been kept unchanged excepting the removal of:
  - Line-final spaces
  - Interlinear spaces
- Table layouts excepting the removal of:
  - Line-final spaces

Newlines have not been changed.

prTitle: Atomic Atlas: decompose Sky Atlas.md into one-folder-per-document tree + sync tooling
